title: misopates orontium var. foliosum
intro: Misopates orontium var. foliosum, also known as golden ragwort or golden mouse ears, is a perennial plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and acting as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. Golden ragwort can be prepared into herbal infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
